Episodes.Title: Homecoming: Part 1
Episodes.Writer: Rob Hoegee, Murray Boltinoff, Arnold Drake
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans receive a distress call from Beast Boy's former team, the Doom Patrol.

Episodes.Title: Homecoming: Part 2
Episodes.Writer: Simon Racioppa, Richard Elliott, Murray Boltinoff
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Beast Boy joins the Doom Patrol in trying to stop the Brain's quantum generator.

Episodes.Title: Trust
Episodes.Actors: Scott Menville, Hynden Walch, Dee Bradley Baker
Episodes.Plot: Madam Rouge tries to gain Hotspots trust in order to snag his Titans communicator.

Episodes.Title: For Real
Episodes.Actors: Khary Payton, Alexander Polinsky, Dee Bradley Baker
Episodes.Plot: Control Freak attempts to get revenge on the Titans. Unfortunately the Titans are out of town and left Titans East in charge.

Episodes.Title: Snowblind
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Titans get a distress call from Russia. They encounter Red Star, a super powered outcast and a creature that thrives on radiation.

Episodes.Title: Kole
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: While pursuing Dr. Light, the Titans stumble across a prehistoric jungle in the middle of the arctic. They make friends with a young girl named Kole and her friend Gnarrk.

Episodes.Title: Lightspeed
Episodes.Writer: Rob Hoegee, Gardner Fox, Harry Lampert
Episodes.Actors: Jason Marsden, Michael Rosenbaum, Lauren Tom
Episodes.Plot: To impress the Brotherhood of Evil, the HIVE FIVE attempt to deal with their new opponent, Kid Flash.

Episodes.Title: Revved Up
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: A thief manages to steal Robin's personal briefcase. He challenges the Titans to a race. Whomever wins the race gets to keep the briefcase.

Episodes.Title: Go
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Gordanian transports Starfire and tries to bring her to their home world. She escapes and causes havoc on Earth. Robin and other young heroes arrive to stop her. The origin of the Titans.

Episodes.Title: Calling All Titans
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: By using the Titans communicator, the Brotherhood of Evil tracks down all of the Titans around the world.

Episodes.Title: Titans Together
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: The Brain and his army have managed to capture or neutralize many Titans and their honorary members. Beast Boy leads the few remaining honorary members in a desperate attempt to free the captives and stop The Brain once and for all.

Episodes.Title: Things Change
Episodes.Actors: Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton
Episodes.Plot: Terra is back but she doesn't seem to remember anything. Beast Boy becomes obsessed with helping her.
